description_long: This is a modern, rectangular luggage case with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a spacious interior. The exterior is predominantly black with a large, light green front panel featuring a subtle decorative pattern, and the lid is accented with blue and purple panels. The interior is lined with a light blue material, providing a clean and bright contrast to the darker exterior. Red accents, possibly representing latches or hinges, are visible on the lid and sides, adding a touch of color and functionality. The case appears to be made of a hard, durable material, likely plastic or polycarbonate, designed to protect its contents. There are no visible wheels, handles, or brand logos, and the overall design is sleek and minimalistic.
description: A sleek, rectangular hard-shell luggage case with a hinged lid, black exterior, and colorful accent panels. The interior is spacious and lined in light blue, with red latch details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, light green front panel with a subtle pattern, and spacious light blue interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the lid, purple accent panel, and red latch detail on the side.
description_view_2: Top-down view with the lid closed, displaying the green front panel and the gray top panel with red latch accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the purple accent panel and red latch detail, with the lid open and interior visible.
